Container.Name: AgenticSeek
Container.Overview: AgenticSeek — a 100% local, private AI assistant that can autonomously browse the web, write and execute code, and manage files. This single container runs the React web UI, the Python API backend, and the Valkey (Redis-compatible) cache together. Requires a SearxNG instance accessible on your network.
Container.Requires: A SearxNG instance must be accessible on your network — set SEARXNG_BASE_URL to point at it.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the AgenticSeek React frontend. Open http://[SERVER-IP]:3000 in your browser.

Config.Name: Backend Port
Config.Description: Port for the AgenticSeek backend API.

Config.Name: Appdata Path
Config.Description: Path on the Unraid host where AgenticSeek application data (config.ini, sessions, etc.) is stored.

Config.Name: Workspace Path
Config.Description: Directory that the AI agent can read from and write files to. Point this to a folder you want the agent to work in.

Config.Name: Screenshots Path
Config.Description: Path where screenshots taken by the browser automation agent are saved.

Config.Name: Redis Data Path
Config.Description: Path where the internal Valkey (Redis-compatible) cache persists its data to disk.

Config.Name: SearxNG URL
Config.Description: URL of your pre-installed SearxNG instance used for web searches. Replace with the IP/hostname and port of your existing SearxNG server (e.g. http://192.168.1.100:8080). SearxNG must be installed separately as a prerequisite.

Config.Name: Provider Name
Config.Description: LLM provider to use. Options: ollama, openai, deepseek, openrouter, together, google, anthropic, huggingface, lm_studio.

Config.Name: Provider Model
Config.Description: Model name to use with the selected provider. For Ollama use the model tag (e.g. deepseek-r1:14b, llama3.2, qwen2.5-coder:14b). For cloud providers use the API model name.

Config.Name: Provider Server Address
Config.Description: Address of the LLM server. For a local Ollama instance running on the Unraid host, use host.docker.internal:11434.

Config.Name: Agent Name
Config.Description: Display name for the AI agent.

Config.Name: Backend URL
Config.Description: Full URL of the AgenticSeek backend reachable from your browser. Replace [SERVER-IP] with the actual IP address or hostname of your Unraid server (e.g. http://192.168.1.100:7777).

Config.Name: Backend Port (env)
Config.Description: Port number the backend listens on inside the container. Should match the Backend Port mapping above.

Config.Name: Node Environment
Config.Description: Node.js environment mode. Use 'production' for normal use or 'development' for live-reload during development.

Config.Name: OpenAI API Key
Config.Description: OpenAI API key. Only required when using the openai provider.

Config.Name: DeepSeek API Key
Config.Description: DeepSeek API key. Only required when using the deepseek provider.

Config.Name: OpenRouter API Key
Config.Description: OpenRouter API key. Only required when using the openrouter provider.

Config.Name: Together API Key
Config.Description: Together AI API key. Only required when using the together provider.

Config.Name: Google API Key
Config.Description: Google Gemini API key. Only required when using the google provider.

Config.Name: Anthropic API Key
Config.Description: Anthropic Claude API key. Only required when using the anthropic provider.

Config.Name: HuggingFace API Key
Config.Description: HuggingFace API key. Only required when using the huggingface provider.
